## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Sylvain (Augment Code) and Jason (GrowthX) to discuss ongoing marketing initiatives and new product features.](https://fathom.video/share/U62Zgyxo8f1YpPemQMqgcZQWkzXa2Wgh?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Backlink strategy approved; Jason to set up tracking for paid and earned backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/U62Zgyxo8f1YpPemQMqgcZQWkzXa2Wgh?tab=summary&timestamp=74.0)
  - [New CLI feature launching next week; priority to build a command directory website](https://fathom.video/share/U62Zgyxo8f1YpPemQMqgcZQWkzXa2Wgh?tab=summary&timestamp=37.0)
  - [YouTube ad campaign underway (30-day sprint, $500k spend) with potential content for reuse](https://fathom.video/share/U62Zgyxo8f1YpPemQMqgcZQWkzXa2Wgh?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)
  - [Post-Hog analytics still active; Sylvain to grant Jason access for directional insights](https://fathom.video/share/U62Zgyxo8f1YpPemQMqgcZQWkzXa2Wgh?tab=summary&timestamp=1488.0)

## Topics

### Backlink Strategy Update

### YouTube Ad Campaign
